title: Trigger
description: Specifies how a WorkflowSpec is activated: on a cron schedule, in response to an event, or manually.

kind.description: The trigger type: schedule (cron), event (reacts to an AsyncAPI channel message), or manual.

schedule.description: Cron expression for schedule triggers (e.g. "0 2 * * *"). Required when kind is "schedule".

eventType.description: AsyncAPI event type string for event triggers. Required when kind is "event".
